summary: Executed backend pytest suite against public preview APIs and ran mobile-first Expo web UI integration checks. Core API endpoints are reachable and stable, but two required user-feedback flows are not visible in web preview.

ui_bugs.issue: Tapping generate with no imported photo does not show any visible prompt in web preview (no dialog/inline message), though API call is correctly blocked.
Google Photos action does not show a visible setup-required message in web preview (no dialog/inline status surfaced on tap).

integration_issues.issue: No POST /api/edits was sent (good), but user-facing feedback is missing in web preview.
Expected setup-required guidance not surfaced visually in web preview.

action_items: Replace web-invisible Alert-based messaging for critical flows with visible in-app feedback (toast/banner/modal) for no-photo generate and Google Photos setup-required.
Re-run frontend mobile web checks after UX feedback fix to confirm requirement compliance.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend currently depends on Alert.alert for key status/error messaging; this is not reliably visible in Expo web preview, causing hidden validation/setup states.
Expo logs show deprecated TouchableWithoutFeedback and JS fallback animation warning; non-blocking but should be cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend contract endpoints (/api, /api/presets, /api/google-photos/status, /api/edits GET + validation errors) are stable on public preview URL. Frontend core controls render and interact, no horizontal page overflow detected at 375x667, and no runtime error elements found. Re-verify user-visible feedback once Alert replacement is implemented.
rca_of_issue: RCA: both failing frontend requirements rely on Alert.alert for user feedback. In Expo web preview, tapping related actions did not surface any visible dialog/inline message, so required setup/validation communication is effectively hidden. Repro: open preview at 375x667, tap google-photos-button and generate-edit-button without image. Observed: no visible message, no POST /api/edits for generate flow. Mitigation: render explicit UI message component (banner/toast/modal) driven by state instead of Alert.alert for web-compatible visibility.
